They correctly note the absence of untrusted input handling, external network calls, or obfuscated/malicious patterns. The code does not perform any network communication outside blockchain interactions, does not process user input, and contains no embedded secrets or backdoors.\n\n5. **Malware Score Reflection**:  \n   All reports correctly assign a malware score of 0, which is justified. There is no malicious behavior, code injection, or suspicious activity.\n\n6. **Claims Based on Assumptions**:  \n   The reports avoid unwarranted assumptions, correctly stating that the code is standard, autogenerated, and safe.
